# cancel()

**Instance Method**

Cancels the currently running session when the consent dialog is up or when the webpage is up. This is how applications stop the login process.

## Declaration

```swift
func cancel()
```

## Instance Methods

- **start()**: Starts the session after initializing an instance of SFAuthenticationSession. This will trigger the consent dialog.
